title: The Power of Your Subconscious Mind
author: Joseph Murphy
subline: Whatever you hold in your mind, you become.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- An iceberg. The small visible tip is RED; the massive submerged part is ash. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <line x1="-700" y1="-200" x2="700" y2="-200" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="6 4"/>
    <text x="-720" y="-195" text-anchor="end" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">SURFACE</text>
    <path d="M -50 -200 L 50 -200 L 0 -340 Z" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <text x="0" y="-380" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">CONSCIOUS · 5%</text>
    <path d="M -50 -200 L 50 -200 L 480 600 L -480 600 Z" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none" opacity="0.6">
      <path d="M -100 -100 L 460 580"/>
      <path d="M 100 -100 L -460 580"/>
      <path d="M -240 0 L 440 560"/>
      <path d="M 240 0 L -440 560"/>
      <path d="M 0 -100 L 0 580"/>
    </g>
    <text x="0" y="680" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">SUBCONSCIOUS · 95%</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: An iceberg with a small RED tip (conscious, 5%) above water and a massive ash submerged body (subconscious, 95%). The book is about the part you don't see. 160px whisper title at the bottom.
